chatBubbles: I want to spend 2 weeks in Japan in April with my girlfriend. We love nature, food, and temples. Medium budget.
Great choice! Japan in April is cherry blossom season. I suggest a Tokyo — Kyoto — Osaka route with stops in Nara and Hakone. Want me to show you accommodation options?
Yes, preferably traditional ryokans if possible
Excellent choice! I've selected 3 ryokans with private onsen in Hakone and 2 renovated machiya in Kyoto. I'm also calculating JR Pass routes to optimize your travel...

page.heroSubtitle: Build your itinerary manually step by step, or let our AI assistant create a personalized plan in seconds. You choose how to plan.
page.featuresTitle: Two ways to plan your perfect trip

features.title: Manual planning
features.description: Create your trip from scratch. Add destinations, set dates, and build your day-by-day itinerary exactly how you want it.

features.title: Day-by-day builder
features.description: Drag and drop activities, restaurants, and accommodations. Organize each day visually on a timeline.

features.title: AI-powered planning
features.description: Describe your dream trip in plain English. Our AI creates a complete itinerary with hotels, activities, and optimized routes.

features.title: Smart suggestions
features.description: The AI understands context — season, budget, travel style — and adapts recommendations in real-time.

features.title: Mix both approaches
features.description: Start with AI suggestions, then fine-tune manually. Or build manually and ask AI to fill gaps.

features.title: Collaborative editing
features.description: Everyone in the group can contribute — add ideas, vote on options, and refine the plan together.

faqItems.question: Can I plan a trip without using AI?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely! You can create your entire trip manually. Add destinations, set dates, and build your itinerary step by step using our visual day-by-day planner.

faqItems.question: How does the AI assistant work?
faqItems.answer: Simply describe your trip in natural language — destination, budget, travel style, interests. The AI generates a complete day-by-day itinerary with accommodations, activities, and optimized routes.

faqItems.question: Can I modify AI suggestions?
faqItems.answer: Yes! AI suggestions are just a starting point. You can edit, add, or remove any element. The plan is fully customizable.

faqItems.question: Can I combine manual and AI planning?
faqItems.answer: Definitely. Start with AI to get a base itinerary, then refine manually. Or plan manually and ask AI to suggest activities for specific days.

faqItems.question: Can my group help plan the trip?
faqItems.answer: Yes! Invite your travel companions and everyone can add suggestions, vote on options, and collaborate on the itinerary in real-time.
